# ENT-9106

Timeline fixture: a tradition-class entity with the co-required tradition fields
but NO numeric positioning bounds (`range_start_year` absent). It must render in
the "undated / sequence-only" fallback lane with its verbatim display_range —
never dropped, never assigned invented coordinates.
